narrators.name_en: Abu al-Qasim Ja'far ibn Muhammad ibn Qulawayh

narrators.ambiguity_note: Referred to as 'his father' - identified as Muhammad ibn Qulawayh based on context
Referred to as 'his father' - identified as Sudayr ibn Hakim al-Sayrafi based on context

narrators.name_en: Imam Abu 'Abd Allah (Ja'far al-Sadiq, peace be upon him)

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: 8 - قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو الْقَاسِمِ جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ قُولَوَيْهِ رَحِمَهُ اللَّهُ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي، عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى، عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ، عَنْ حَنَانِ بْنِ سُدَيْرٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ:
isnad_matn.matn_ar: كُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ فَذُكِرَ عِنْدَهُ الْمُؤْمِنُ وَمَا يَجِبُ مِنْ حَقِّهِ، فَالْتَفَتَ إِلَيَّ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ فَقَالَ: يَا أَبَا الْفَضْلِ أَلَا أُحَدِّثُكَ بِحَالِ الْمُؤْمِنِ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ؟ قُلْتُ: بَلَى فَحَدِّثْنِي جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ. فَقَالَ: إِذَا قَبَضَ اللَّهُ رُوحَ الْمُؤْمِنِ صَعِدَ مَلَكَاهُ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ فَقَالَا: يَا رَبِّ عَبْدُكَ وَنِعْمَ الْعَبْدُ، فَيَقُولُ الْجَلِيلُ الْجَبَّارُ: اهْبِطَا إِلَى الدُّنْيَا فَكُونَا عِنْدَ قَبْرِ عَبْدِي، وَمَجِّدَانِي وَسَبِّحَانِي وَهَلِّلَانِي وَكَبِّرَانِي، وَاكْتُبَا ذَلِكَ لِعَبْدِي حَتَّى أَبْعَثَهُ مِنْ قَبْرِهِ. ثُمَّ قَالَ لِي: أَلَا أَزِيدُكَ؟ قُلْتُ: بَلَى زِدْنِي، قَالَ: إِذَا بَعَثَ اللَّهُ الْمُؤْمِنَ مِنْ قَبْرِهِ خَرَجَ مَعَهُ مِثَالٌ يَقْدُمُهُ ، فَكُلَّمَا رَأَى الْمُؤْمِنُ هَوْلًا مِنْ أَهْوَالِ الْقِيَامَةِ قَالَ لَهُ الْمِثَالُ: لَا تَجْزَعْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ وَأَبْشِرْ بِالسُّرُورِ وَالْكَرَامَةِ مِنَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ، قَالَ: فَمَا يَزَالُ يُبَشِّرُهُ بِالسُّرُورِ وَالْكَرَامَةِ مِنَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ حَتَّى يَقِفَ بَيْنَ يَدَيِ اللَّهِ سُبْحَانَهُ فَيُحَاسِبَهُ حِسَابًا يَسِيرًا، وَيَأْمُرَ بِهِ إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ وَالْمِثَالُ أَمَامَهُ، فَيَقُولُ لَهُ الْمُؤْمِنُ: رَحِمَكَ اللَّهُ نِعْمَ الْخَارِجُ خَرَجْتَ مَعِي مِنْ قَبْرِي، مَا زِلْتَ تُبَشِّرُنِي بِالسُّرُورِ وَالْكَرَامَةِ مِنَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ حَتَّى كَانَ ذَلِكَ، فَمَنْ أَنْتَ؟ فَيَقُولُ لَهُ الْمِثَالُ: أَنَا السُّرُورُ الَّذِي أَدْخَلْتَهُ عَلَى أَخِيكَ الْمُؤْمِنِ فِي الدُّنْيَا، خَلَقَنِي اللَّهُ مِنْهُ لِأُبَشِّرَكَ.

en.summary: Imam al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) describes the afterlife experience of a believer: upon death, two angels ascend to heaven praising the servant, and Allah commands them to return to glorify Him at the grave. On Resurrection Day, an image (mithal) accompanies the believer through the terrors of Judgment, offering comfort. After an easy reckoning and entry into Paradise, the image reveals itself as the embodiment of joy the believer brought to fellow believers.
en.seo_question: What happens to a believer after death according to Imam al-Sadiq, and what is the reward for bringing joy to fellow believers?

translations.en: He said: Abu al-Qasim Jafar ibn Muhammad ibn Qulawayh - may Allah have mercy on him - reported from his father, from Sad ibn Abdillah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from al-Hasan ibn Mahbub, from Hannan ibn Sudayr, from his father, who said:

translations.en: I was with Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, when the believer and his rights were mentioned. Abu Abdillah turned to me and said: O Abu al-Fadl, shall I not tell you about the state of the believer with Allah? I said: Yes, tell me, may I be your ransom.
translations.ur: I was with Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, when the believer and his rights were mentioned. Abu Abdillah turned to me and said: O Abu al-Fadl, shall I not tell you about the state of the believer with Allah? I said: Yes, tell me, may I be your ransom.

translations.en: So he said: When Allah seizes the soul of the believer, his two angels ascend to heaven and say: O Lord, Your servant and what an excellent servant! The Majestic, the Compeller says: Descend to the world and remain at the grave of My servant, and glorify Me and praise Me and declare My oneness and magnify Me, and write that for My servant until I resurrect him from his grave.

The Majestic, the Compeller says: Descend to the world and remain at the grave of My servant, and glorify Me and praise Me and declare My oneness and magnify Me, and write that for My servant until I resurrect him from his grave.

translations.en: Then he said to me: Shall I not tell you more? I said: Yes. He said: When Allah resurrects the believer from his grave, there comes out with him an image leading him. Whenever the believer sees a terror from the terrors of the Day of Judgment, the image says to him: Do not be alarmed and do not grieve, and receive glad tidings of delight and honor from Allah, Mighty and Majestic. And it continues to give him glad tidings of delight and honor from Allah until he stands before Allah, Glory be to Him, and He reckons him an easy reckoning, and orders him to Paradise, and the image before him.

Whenever the believer sees a terror from the terrors of the Day of Judgment, the image says to him: Do not be alarmed and do not grieve, and receive glad tidings of delight and honor from Allah, Mighty and Majestic. translations.en: So the believer says to the image: May Allah have mercy on you, what an excellent companion! You came out with me from my grave, you have not ceased giving me glad tidings of delight and honor from Allah, Mighty and Majestic, until that was so. So who are you? The image says: I am the delight that you brought upon your believing brother in the world. Allah created me from it to give you glad tidings.

You came out with me from my grave, you have not ceased giving me glad tidings of delight and honor from Allah, Mighty and Majestic, until that was so. So who are you? The image says: I am the delight that you brought upon your believing brother in the world. Allah created me from it to give you glad tidings.
translations.de: So the believer says to the image: May Allah have mercy on you, what an excellent companion! You came out with me from my grave, you have not ceased giving me glad tidings of delight and honor from Allah, Mighty and Majestic, until that was so. So who are you? The image says: I am the delight that you brought upon your believing brother in the world. Allah created me from it to give you glad tidings.

You came out with me from my grave, you have not ceased giving me glad tidings of delight and honor from Allah, Mighty and Majestic, until that was so. So who are you? The image says: I am the delight that you brought upon your believing brother in the world. Allah created me from it to give you glad tidings.
